properties.body:
[Northern Baltic] FINNISH NAV WARN 362/26
171730 UTC JUL
UNDERWATER DIVING OPERATIONS
ARE TEMPORARILY PAUSED DUE TO WEATHER
IN VICINITY OF 59-26.0N 021-04.5E.
SEVERAL MARKER BUOYS ARE ANCHORED IN THE AREA.
MARINERS ARE REQUESTED TO KEEP SHARP LOOKOUT
AND MINIMUM DISTANCE OF 1.4 NM FROM THE AREA
